zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱下行趋势延续
zh.content:
当前价格1558附近运行，整体结构仍处于下降通道中，反弹动能偏弱，短期或维持震荡偏弱

MACD为负值且柱体扩大，空头动能仍在释放，均线系统中价格位于SMA20下方，短期均线压制明显，反弹易受阻信号偏空

下方支撑关注1550与1535区域，若跌破可能进一步测试1500整数关口；上方阻力位于1580及1610附近，突破需放量确认

建议保持高抛低吸思路，未站稳1610前不宜追多，可在1550附近分批试多，跌破则严格止损控制风险，谨慎操作

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ETH/USD is trading in a mild short-term bearish consolidation after failing to reclaim the 1600 region. Price action remains compressed near the lower boundary of its recent range, suggesting a lack of strong buying momentum. The 24-hour performance shows slight downside pressure, and the market continues to trade below the 20-day simple moving average, reinforcing a corrective phase rather than a sustained uptrend.

Indicator readings reinforce the bearish bias. MACD is negative at -20.14782, indicating persistent downward momentum and limited bullish crossover potential in the near term. With RSI data unavailable, momentum confirmation relies primarily on price structure and moving average positioning. Trading below the 20-day SMA at 1611.16200 further signals weakness, as buyers have not yet regained medium-term control of the trend.

Immediate support is seen at the session low around 1557.72, which currently acts as a short-term demand zone. A break below this level could expose the psychological 1550 area and potentially extend toward 1500 if selling pressure accelerates. On the upside, initial resistance is located at 1568.23, followed by stronger resistance at the 20-day SMA near 1611.16, which aligns with a key trend barrier.

Given current conditions, traders may favor a cautious approach, with bias toward selling rallies until price reclaims the 20-day SMA. Short positions could be considered on rejection near 1568–1610 resistance zone, with tight risk control above 1615. For buyers, patience is warranted; confirmation of strength would require a sustained break above 1611 and follow-through momentum. Until then, range-bound downside risk remains dominant currently.
